diagnostic.description: A tooth-shaped cap placed over a damaged or weakened tooth to restore its shape, size, strength, and appearance.
A restorative procedure where decayed or damaged tooth structure is removed and replaced with a filling material to restore function and shape.
A restorative procedure where decayed or damaged tooth structure is removed and replaced with a filling material to restore function and shape.
Root Canal Treatment — a procedure to remove infected or damaged pulp tissue from inside the tooth, followed by sealing to prevent reinfection.
